title: Muteki Koujin Daitarn 3
titleNative: 無敵鋼人ダイターン３
synopsis: Souzou Haran was a brilliant scientist that was conducting research on Mars. He created a form of cyborg life with the ability to think for itself. These cyborgs, dubbed the Meganoids, soon ran out of control and killed Dr. Haran along with his whole family, save his youngest son, the 16-year-old Banjou Haran. Banjou escapes from Mars on a rocket with a solar-powered super robot called Daitarn 3, which was built with the special metals of Mars. Now eighteen years old and living on Earth in a luxurious mansion, Banjou fights against the Meganoids with the aid of his faithful butler Garrison and his two gorgeous companions Reika and Beauty. Together they must stop the evil Meganoids which aspire to turn all humans into cyborgs and thus "improve" the human race. (Source: AniDB)

title: GR: Giant Robo
titleNative: GR -ジャイアントロボ-
synopsis: The year is 20XX. Mysterious huge robots called "Giant Robo (GR)" started to appear all over the world and destroy cities. The earth was covered with fear. And their next target is Japan! The hero of this animation Daisaku Kusama, who works in a diving shop, encounters a mysterious girl, simply called V who leads him to make a contract with an enormous robot "Giant Robo 1 (GR1)" at the ancient ruins (Minami Yonaguni Island) in Okinawa. He made a contract with UNISOM (main organization) and was approved to be a commander of GR1. Thus his battle has begun against GRO (antagonist organization) and creates a lot of dramas. Before long, Giant Robo of the 21st century will ask the world the true meaning of its power. (Source: AniDB)

title: Steam Detectives
titleNative: 快傑 蒸気探偵団
synopsis: The scene is Steam City, a London-ish city which represents an entire civilization run by coal and steam power. Because of steam, the city is sometimes covered in a mist. Villains take advantage of the steamy mist to hide and execute their evil plans. Only a few dare venture into what's beyond the steamy mist. They are known as the Steam Detectives: Narutaki (and his convertible all-purpose pistol), his nurse-assistant Lingling, and his Megamaton robot Gohliki. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Mazinkaiser vs. Great General of Darkness
titleEnglish: Mazinkaiser vs. Great General of Darkness
titleNative: マジンカイザー　死闘！暗黒大将軍
synopsis: They strike without warning and instantly plunge the world into terror. The Great General of Darkness leads the underground Mycenae Empire in a bid to conquer Earth. The Mazinger Army falls before the seven generals under him, each of them leading an army of superior Warrior Beasts. Meanwhile, Archduke Gorgon is relentlessly pursuing Koji Kabuto, trying to eliminate him before he can reach Mazinkaiser. But a red light in the sky over Mt. Fuji portends the greatest battle in history! (Source: Discotek)

titleNative: マクロスFB7 銀河流魂 オレノウタヲキケ!
synonyms: Macross FB7: Ginga Rukon - Ore no Uta o Kike!
Macross FB7 Listen to My Song!
synopsis: In 2059, five decades after the Space War I conflict seen in the first Macross story. Macross Frontier, the 25th New Macross Class super-long-distance colonization fleet, is journeying through the galaxy to a new paradise to call home. However, it is locked in a state of war with a strange enemy called Vajra. Macross FB7 is the 30th anniversary work of the Macross franchise.

title: RS Keikaku: Rebirth Storage
titleNative: RS計画　-Rebirth Storage-
synopsis: Winner of smartphone novel company Every Star's MechaTsuku contest. RS Project takes place in a parallel world that resembles modern Japan, but where alien lifeforms known as "Kikou" (Trick) fell from the sky ten years prior and started attacking humanity. The main characters are a pilot, Mizuru Mido, and her assistant, Fuu Sagami, who use a mecha made out of an enemy's remains. However, battle causes memory loss for the pilot, and they must unravel the mystery as to why. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: GoShogun
titleNative: 戦国魔神ゴーショーグン
synonyms: Demon God of the War Torn Land Goshogun
synopsis: A meteor strikes the Earth and is found to emanate a powerful new energy called Beamler, which is used to power a battle robot, GoShogun, and a teleporting fortress, Good Thunder. The Docougar Crime Syndicate, lead by crime lord Neo Neros, try to steal the secret of the energy from the inventor of GoShogun, but he kills himself rather than let them acquire it. His son is targeted by Neo Neros next, but he is taken in by the crew aboard Good Thunder, who travel the world fighting NeoNeros's forces with GoShogun. (Source: Wikipedia)

titleNative: スカイガールズ
synopsis: In the near future, Earth is at war with aliens called Worms. The war leaves the population of Earth decimated, with young men the main casualties. The Worms were beaten back but their re-emergence heralds the creation of a mecha unit called the Sonic Divers, piloted by 3 young girls to counter this threat. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Time Bokan 24
titleNative: タイムボカン24
synonyms: タイムボカン Twemty Four
synopsis: The anime centres on Tokio, a junior high student living in the present time who is suddenly made a member of the 24th century's Space-Time Administration Bureau. Immediately, he learns that the history he has learned in the textbooks is wrong, and there is a more interesting version of history where the peerless beauty Cleopatra is actually the comic duo of Cleo and Patra, Momotarou is more of an ogre than actual ogres. Together with his teammate Karen, they use the 24 Bokan Mecha to search for the True History. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: alice gear aegis Expansion: Heart Pounding! Actress Packed Mermaid Grand Prix!
titleRomaji: Alice Gear Aegis: Doki! Actress Darake no Mermaid Grand Prix ♥
titleEnglish: alice gear aegis Expansion: Heart Pounding! Actress Packed Mermaid Grand Prix!
titleNative: アリス・ギア・アイギス ～ドキッ！アクトレスだらけのマーメイドグランプリ♥～
synopsis: Anime adaptation of the 3D smartphone shooting game "Alice Gear Aegis" by the developer COLOPL. The M-1 Tag Team Grand Prix finally kicks off! The race will determine the top mermaid and winner of 10 million yen! Too bad there’s a big frog and a cyclone in the way. (Source: HIDIVE) Note: The anime's other episodes are only viewable by scanning a QR code contained within 3 different figures. Depending on the figure that the QR code is taken from, the ending will be different.

title: Kishin Taisen Gigantic Formula
titleNative: 機神大戦 ギガンティック・フォーミュラ
synopsis: 2035 A.D. The heads of ancient giant idols were excavated all over the world. Using those twelve stones statues, Humanity had barely overcome the threat of extinction called the "Equatorial Winter". But the stone statues had forced Humanity to construct colossal suits of armor as their bodies and demanded that the humans fight each other. (Source: Anime News Network)
